===
ops_pipe
===
a=
	b
	->test()
	->test2()
a=
	b
	->test()
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (bin_op_expr
        part: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        part: (operator)
        part: (function_call_pnc_expr
          caller: (variable_expr
            (identifier)))
        part: (operator)
        part: (function_call_pnc_expr
          caller: (variable_expr
            (identifier))))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (bin_op_expr
        part: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        part: (operator)
        part: (function_call_pnc_expr
          caller: (variable_expr
            (identifier)))))))
